intro: Tephrosia colophony is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Tephrosia colophony include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
